actions.name: Night Terror Stance
actions.description:
Target: A Commanded @Trait[ghost] Creature.

Effect: Effect: This Stance remains active until the initiator or affected @Trait[ghost] choose to end it, or the Night Terror clock has been consumed.

While in the Night Terror Stance, the Initiator establishes a Night Terror Clock of 5 Spans. In the event that the affected @Trait[ghost] is removed from Combat, the Initiator may transfer this Stance to a new @Trait[ghost].

Whenever the affected @Trait[ghost] uses a @Trait[ghost]-Type attack, or applies a @Trait[major-affliction] or @Trait[minor-affliction] to a Foe, the Night Terror clock is progressed by 1 Span (stacking in the event the @Trait[ghost] attack applies such an affliction). When the Night Terror clock is filled, the affected @Trait[ghost] may consume it to inflict @Affliction[nightmares 5] on a foe within 5m, bypassing any need for the target to be @Affliction[drowsy] first. In the event that the target is already @Affliction[drowsy], make the appropriate modification to @Affliction[nightmares] duration.

While in the Night Terror Stance, @Trait[psychic] attacks gain +1 Effectiveness Stage versus the affected @Trait[ghost]
